add_noise.description: Add white noise to make the haptic signal feel rougher/grainier
prompts: make the haptic signal feel rough.
introduce white noise to the signal.
modify the haptic signal to be more grainy.
integrate white noise into the signal.
add grain to the haptic signal.
enhance the haptic signal with white noise.
add noise to make it feel rougher.
add noise to the haptic signal.
enhance the roughness of the haptic signal.
make the haptic signal feel more textured.

butterworth_lowpass.description: Apply lowpass filter to remove harsh high frequencies

insert_signal.description: Insert a haptic pulse or tap at a position
prompts: add a tap at this position.
place a haptic signal at the specified location.
add a pulse at the target location.
place a haptic pulse at the target area.
add a new haptic signal at the selected point.
insert a new signal at the desired point.
insert a new haptic pulse here.
insert a tap at the specified position.

remove_signal.description: Remove a section of the haptic signal
prompts: erase a specific interval of the haptic signal
clear a section from the haptic data
delete a particular section of the haptic signal
deactivate a certain region of the haptic wave
erase a specific area of the haptic wave
delete a part of the haptic signal
clear a section of the haptic data
remove a segment of the haptic signal
remove a part from the haptic signal
cut out a part of the haptic data

mask_signal.description: Mute/silence a portion of the signal
prompts: could you silence the signal in the middle 15 seconds?
can you mask the sound in the 12-second range?
i want to silence the signal from 5 to 10 seconds.
could you mute the sound from 3 to 9 seconds?
can you mask the signal in the first 10 seconds?
mask the signal during the 3-second interval.
i want to mute the sound for the last 5 seconds.
mask the signal for the 8-second span.
i need to silence the signal from 1 to 5 seconds.
i need to mute the signal from 2 to 4 seconds.

amplitude_increase.description: Make the haptic vibration stronger/more intense

amplitude_decrease.description: Make the haptic vibration weaker/more subtle
prompts: reduce the intensity of the vibration.
decrease the strength of the haptic sensation.
reduce the amplitude of the vibrations.
shrink the amplitude of the vibration.
decrease the force of the haptic feedback.
lower the level of the haptic signal.
lower the volume of the haptic signal.

downsample.description: Reduce the resolution/quality of the signal
prompts: - decrease the haptic data's level of detail
- lower the haptic data's quality factor
- reduce signal quality for better performance
- scale down the haptic signal's fidelity

roughen_signal.description: Add texture/roughness by layering a phase-shifted copy on top
prompts: enhance the signal with a roughened version using phase shift.
apply a roughened haptic signal by layering phase-shifted copies.
roughen the signal with a phase-shifted copy.
add texture to the haptic data by layering a phase-shifted copy.
modify the signal to include a roughened phase-shifted copy.
apply a roughened signal by blending a phase-shifted copy.
layer a phase-shifted copy to roughen the haptic signal.
modify the haptic signal to include a roughened layer.
add texture to the haptic data by using phase-shifted layers.
enhance the signal with a roughened texture using phase shift.

normalize_signal.description: Normalize the signal to full dynamic range
prompts: adjust the signal to its full dynamic range.
set the signal to full scale.
scale the signal to its peak.
scale the signal to max amplitude.
set the signal to its full scale.
